title: Identity Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter schema for identity .md files. Placed between --- delimiters at the top of an identity markdown file. The body after the frontmatter is the system prompt text.

name.description: Tier name (e.g., 'lead', 'researcher'). Must match the tier key in the models config.

focus.description: Focus areas for this identity (used in routing context).

grammar.description: Grammar file reference (GBNF key from grammar registry). Constrains all output from this identity.

auto_chain.description: Target tier for automatic chaining. When set, the engine auto-delegates to this tier after the current identity completes.

allowed_tools.description: Tool filter — only these tools are available to this identity. Empty or absent = all tools. Fully-qualified names (e.g., 'filesystem.read_file', 'entropic.delegate').

bash_commands.description: Allowed bash commands for this identity (when bash server is enabled).

validation_rules.description: Per-identity constitutional validation rules. Appended to global constitution rules during critique. Each string is a single rule statement.

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens per generation for this identity.

enable_thinking.description: Enable <think> block output for this identity.

model_preference.description: Bundled model key preference (e.g., 'primary', 'lightweight', 'mid'). Resolved via bundled_models.yaml.

interstitial.description: Interstitial role — runs between other identities (e.g., compactor).

routable.description: Whether the router can select this identity. Set false for utility identities that are only reached via explicit delegation.

role_type.description: Role classification. front_office = user-facing, back_office = internal specialist, utility = infrastructure.

explicit_completion.description: Requires explicit entropic.complete tool call to signal task completion. When false, the engine infers completion from empty tool calls.

phases.description: Named generation phases with per-phase inference parameters.
